title: Proclamation No. 286, s. 1938
text:
PROCLAMATION NO. 286

RESERVING FOR RAILROAD PURPOSES A PARCEL OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE BARRIO OF SAN ANTONIO, MUNICIPALITY OF MUÑOZ, PROVINCE OF NUEVA ECIJA, ISLAND OF LUZON.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce and pursuant to the provisions of section eighty-three of Commonwealth Act Numbered One hundred and forty-one, I hereby withdraw from sale or settlement and reserve for railroad purposes, under the administration of the Manila Railroad Company, subject to private rights, if any there be, the following-described parcel of the public domain, situated in the barrio of San Antonio, municipality of Muñoz, Province of Nueva Ecija, Island of Luzon, and particularly described in Bureau of Lands plan Psd-5042, to wit:

Lot No. 405-A.—A parcel of land (lot No. 405-A of the subsdivision plan Psd-5041, being a portion of lot No. 405 of the cadastral survey of Muñoz, G. L. R. O. Cadastral Record No. 282), situated in the barrio of San Antonio, municipality of Muñoz, Province of Nueva Ecija. Bounded on the NE., by lot No. 405-C of the subdivision plan and lot No. 404-A of plan Psd-5043; on the SW. by lot No. 405-B of the subdivision plan; and on the NW., by lot No. 409-A of plan Psd-5040. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being S. 73° 32’ W., 347.68 meters, more or less, from B. B. No. 35, barrio of San Antonio, municipality of Muñoz, thence N. 6° 04’ E., 30.11 m. to point “2;” thence S. 83° 57’ E., 17.54 m. to point “3;” thence S. 82° 01’ E., 20.51 m. to point “4;” thence S. 80 07’ E., 19.18 m. to point “5;” thence S. 22° 27’ E., 36.35 m. to point “6;” thence N. 78° 12’ W., 18.64 m. to point “7;” thence N. 80° 08’ W., 19.50 m. to point “8;” thence N. 81° 59’ W., 19.50 m. to point “9;” thence N. 84° 00’ W., 17.03 m. to the point of beginning; containing an area of one thousand nine hundred eighty-five square meters (1,985), more or less. All points referred are indicated on the plan; and on the ground, points “1” to “9,” inclusive, are marked by P. L. S./M. R. concrete monuments, 18 cm. diameter by 72 cm.; bearings true; declination, 0° 42’ E.; date of the original survey, August 1917-February, 1919; and that of the subdivision survey, October 1, 1928-January 31, 1929.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done at the City of Manila, this nineteenth day of July, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and thirty-eight, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the third.

[SEAL]

President of the Philippines

By the President:

Secretary to the President
